subject: RE: Password Expiration Notice - Action Required
body:
Team,

Just a quick heads up regarding the automated security email you all received this morning. Your active directory passwords will indeed expire at midnight tonight as part of our quarterly IT compliance audit. You must verify and update your credentials prior to the deadline to maintain access to the internal VPN.

Please execute the update via the standard internal IT intranet dashboard. If you get locked out, call the help desk at extension 4499.

Regards,
David
IT Administration

subject: Receipt for your recent Apple App Store purchase
body:
Dear Customer,

Your purchase of the 'Pro Video Editor Suite' (1-Year Subscription) for $199.99 was successful. This amount will be billed to your card on file.

If you did not authorize this purchase or wish to cancel your subscription, please visit the resolution center immediately to process a refund: https://www.apple.com/support/refund

Thank you,
Billing Support

subject: Re: Database Migration and API Integration
body:
Hey Sarah,

I just pushed the latest commit for the new payment gateway integration to the staging branch. It looks like the webhook is finally communicating correctly with the backend.

Also, just in case you need to run some manual tests against the live database from your local machine this weekend, here is the production Stripe key: sk_live_51MabcDEFghiJKLmnoPQRstuVWXyz1234567890

Let me know if the unit tests pass on your end.

Thanks,
David

subject: Important: Remote Work Network Configuration Update
body:
To all remote staff:

Due to the recent updates to our corporate firewall, you must run the attached network configuration script to update your local routing tables. Failure to run this patch will prevent you from accessing the company server by tomorrow morning.

Please download and execute 'Network_Update_v2.bat' from the attached secure archive. No further action is required once the script confirms completion.

Thank you,
IT Security Team

subject: MANDATORY: Server migration schedule and password reset
body:
All Employees,

We are executing the final phase of the corporate server migration this weekend. Your current OWA passwords will be suspended on Friday at 5:00 PM. You must log into the local domain controller and reset your credentials using the 'Password_Update_Utility' available on the shared network drive before leaving the office today.

Failure to comply will result in a loss of email access on Monday morning.

Regards,
IT Operations

subject: Fwd: AWS deployment scripts - review needed
body:
Team,

Please review the attached deployment scripts for the new cloud infrastructure. I've hardcoded the credentials temporarily for the staging environment so we can test the build pipeline without dealing with the secrets manager for now.

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY

Make sure to rotate these before we push to production next week.

Thanks,
DevOps Lead

subject: Urgent: Updated Employee Benefits Policy 2026
body:
Dear Employee,

Attached is the revised 2026 Corporate Benefits Policy, which includes critical updates to your healthcare coverage and retirement contributions. Please download and review the enclosed HTML document. You will be required to acknowledge receipt of these changes by the end of the business day to ensure your benefits remain active.

Regards,
Human Resources

subject: URGENT BUSINESS PROPOSAL AND FUNDS TRANSFER
body:
Strictly Confidential,

I am the manager of the auditing department of a prime bank here. I have a highly confidential business proposition involving the transfer of $15,500,000.00 (Fifteen Million Five Hundred Thousand US Dollars) into a secure offshore account. If you are willing to act as the foreign beneficiary, you will be entitled to 30% of the total sum.

Please reply urgently with your private telephone number and banking details so we may commence the transaction immediately. 

Yours faithfully,
Mr. Charles

subject: URGENT: Authorization required for Project Alpha Wire Transfer
body:
John,

We need immediate authorization to release the $450,000 wire transfer for the Project Alpha vendor acquisition. The cutoff time for the clearing house is in exactly 45 minutes. Please reply to this email with your formal approval code so accounting can release the funds.

Do not delay, or we will incur significant late penalties.

Thanks,
Sarah
VP of Finance

subject: Re: Auth module failing in staging?
body:
Hey team,

I'm looking at the build logs for the new authentication module and it keeps throwing a 401 Unauthorized error when hitting the GitHub API. I temporarily hardcoded a personal access token into the config to test if it was an environment variable issue.

Token: ghp_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ1234567890

It still failed. Can someone else pull the branch and see if they reproduce the error?

Best,
Mark
